_comment: Featured pack metadata for the New Chase daily post. Update when the featured pack rotates. pack_price is used at runtime to derive the chase-threshold filter (card.price >= 10 * pack_price) substituted into queries/new_chase.sql at the :threshold placeholder. pack_image_url should be the BARE pack render (transparent PNG, no marketing text baked in) hosted on cdn.dripshop.live/product/. pack_name is rendered as-is by src/new_chase_renderer (string_transforms.pack_name_for_canva uppercases + Pokemon-strips it).
